items.title_ur: New NYC Mayor Mamdani says he holds no crypto, will not buy Adams' memecoin
summary_en: New NYC Mayor Mamdani says he holds no crypto, will not buy Adams' memecoin
Less than two weeks into office, Zohran Mamdani said ”no” when questioned whether he held any crypto or planned to invest in a former New York City mayor's memecoin project.
